market.question: Will $ANSEM flip $PUMP before Dec 31, 2026?
market.summary: Native YES/NO market on whether $ANSEM overtakes $PUMP by market cap before December 31, 2026 at 11:59 PM UTC. Resolves YES the moment $ANSEM's DexScreener market cap is greater than $PUMP's at any point in the window; otherwise NO at the deadline. Both caps are read live from DexScreener by mint address (Solana pump.fun tokens).

trending.headline: $ANSEM flips $PUMP · YES 92¢ / NO 8¢ · 3 bets · $12 pool · closes Dec 31 · @playhunchxyz @pumpfun

market.question: Will $ANSEM close above a $100M FDV on at least 10 daily candles in July 2026?
market.summary: A native Hunch YES/NO market on whether $ANSEM (ANSEM “The Black Bull”, the Solana pump.fun token 9cRCn9rG…TGpump) closes above a $100M fully-diluted valuation on at least 10 daily candles during July 2026. Only the CLOSE of each UTC daily candle counts — an intraday spike (wick) above $100M that falls back before the candle closes does NOT count. Once per day, ~40 minutes after the 00:00 UTC daily candle close, $ANSEM's DexScreener fully-diluted valuation is recorded as that candle's close; YES if at least 10 of July's daily closes are at or above $100M FDV, otherwise NO. Winners split the entire pool pro-rata (parimutuel). $ANSEM sat ~$98.5M FDV at creation.

trending.headline: $ANSEM: 10 daily closes over $100M FDV · July 2026 · YES 99¢ / NO 1¢ · 1 bet · $10 pool · closes Jul 31 · @playhunchxyz

market.question: Will Base officially launch a token by December 31, 2026?
market.shortTitle: Base launches a token by Dec 31, 2026
market.summary: A native Hunch YES/NO market on whether Base ships its own officially sanctioned token — live, publicly transferable, and tradable — on or before December 31, 2026. Announcements, roadmaps, and testnet placeholders do not count. Settled by Hunch from official Base communications and a consensus of credible reporting.

trending.headline: Base launches a token by Dec 31, 2026 · YES 99¢ / NO 1¢ · 1 bet · $10 pool · closes Dec 31 · @playhunchxyz

market.question: How many times will Base stop producing blocks before 2027?
market.summary: A native multi-outcome Hunch market: how many times will Base go DOWN — stop producing blocks for at least 15 minutes — between launch and December 31, 2026 (UTC)? Pick the count band. Outages are detected automatically from Base's own mainnet blocks over JSON-RPC: a quorum of independent public RPCs is polled and an outage is counted only when every reachable endpoint's chain tip is stale, so a single flaky node can't fabricate one. Only outages that BEGIN after this market opens count — any outage already in progress at launch is excluded, so “0 times” stays a live outcome. Resolves at the deadline to the band containing the final outage count; winners split the entire pool pro-rata (parimutuel).

trending.headline: Base outages (≥15 min) in 2026 · 5 outcomes · 1 bet · $9 pool · closes Dec 31, 2026 · @playhunchxyz

market.question: Will $ANSEM close green on all 7 daily candles from July 4–10, 2026?
market.summary: A native Hunch YES/NO market on whether $ANSEM (ANSEM “The Black Bull”, the Solana pump.fun token 9cRCn9rG…TGpump) prints a GREEN daily candle on every one of the 7 UTC days from July 4 through July 10, 2026. A daily candle is green when its CLOSE is above its OPEN — and since $ANSEM trades 24/7 with no gap, each UTC day’s open is the previous day’s close, so a green candle means that day’s close beat the day before. Resolves NO the moment ANY of the 7 candles closes red (close at or below its open); resolves YES only if all 7 candles close green. The July-4 candle’s open is $ANSEM’s July-3 daily close. Once per day, ~40 minutes after the 00:00 UTC daily candle close, $ANSEM’s DexScreener FDV (which for this fixed-supply token moves 1:1 with price) is recorded as that candle’s close — only the close counts, never an intraday wick. Winners split the entire pool pro-rata (parimutuel). $ANSEM sat ~$103M FDV at creation.

trending.headline: $ANSEM: 7 green daily candles · Jul 4–10 · YES 1¢ / NO 99¢ · 1 bet · $5 pool · closes Jul 10 · @playhunchxyz

market.question: Will Arbitrum's DeFi TVL reach $2B by July 31, 2026?
market.summary: A native Hunch YES/NO market: will the total DeFi TVL on Arbitrum reach $2B at any point before July 31, 2026 (UTC)? TVL is ~$1.25B today, read live from DefiLlama's canonical per-chain figure. YES locks the instant a confirmed reading touches $2B; otherwise NO at the deadline. Stakes escrow onchain in the Hunch vault on Arbitrum One; winners split the pool pro-rata (parimutuel).

trending.headline: Arbitrum TVL → $2B · YES 99¢ / NO 1¢ · 1 bet · $1 pool · closes Jul 31 · @playhunchxyz

market.question: When will the Bankr ecosystem's cumulative Uniswap protocol volume cross $5B?
market.summary: A native multi-outcome Hunch market: pick the UTC window in which the Bankr ecosystem's all-time cumulative Uniswap protocol volume first crosses $5B. The running total is ~$4.08B today and read live from a public Dune query. Resolves to the window containing the first confirmed $5B crossing — the instant it happens — or to “After Aug 31” if it hasn't crossed by then. Winners split the entire pool pro-rata (parimutuel).

trending.headline: Bankr × Uniswap volume → $5B · when · 6 outcomes · 1 bet · $1 pool · closes Aug 31 · @playhunchxyz

market.question: Will this 100-flip round land Heads, Tails, or an exact Tie?
market.summary: Always-on live-momentum coin flip: every 5 minutes a round flips a coin 100 times (one every 3 seconds), streaming live. Bet Heads majority, Tails majority, or an exact 50–50 Tie (3-way parimutuel). Bets lock 60 seconds before the close. Each flip = keccak256(seed, i) & 1 from a seed derived off-chain from a public drand beacon (League of Entropy) — provably fair and independently verifiable. Rounds run back-to-back forever at this same link.

trending.headline: The Flip · $HUNCH · YES 50¢ / NO 50¢ · be the first to bet · closes Jul 5 22:50 UTC · @playhunchxyz
